states.description: Pi Music Player main screen showing PLAYLISTS tab
Tracks listing tab showing all songs
visual_cues: Track list with titles and artists
'No Music found! Tap here to learn how to import Music into …'

states.description: Dialog for creating a new playlist
Sort By dialog for tracks list (Title/Date Added/Duration/Album/Artist + Ascending)
visual_cues: options: Title, Date Added, Duration, Album, Artist

states.description: Sort By dialog for artists list (Artist/No. of Albums/No. of Tracks + Ascending)
visual_cues: options: Artist, No. of Albums, No. of Tracks

states.description: Single-artist detail page showing the artist's tracks and, near the top, a summary of song/album counts and total duration
visual_cues: artist name rendered as the header/toolbar title
list of track rows beneath the header, each with title and duration
summary label near the top (e.g. 'N songs', 'M albums')

transitions.postcondition: new playlist added under Custom Playlists

strategies.name: CREATE_PLAYLIST
steps: open_app('Pi Music Player')
on my_music_playlists (PLAYLISTS tab), click the floating + button (bottom-right)
in create_playlist_dialog, input playlist name into 'Enter Name'
click OK
strategies.success_signal: New playlist appears under 'Custom Playlists' section of PLAYLISTS tab
strategies.fallback: If dialog does not appear, ensure PLAYLISTS tab is selected; re-click FAB

strategies.name: QUERY_TOTAL_TRACKS
steps: open_app('Pi Music Player')
click TRACKS tab
read 'N Tracks' header
strategies.success_signal: Header displays total tracks count (e.g., '15 Tracks')

strategies.name: QUERY_SORTED_TRACKS_BY_TITLE
steps: open_app('Pi Music Player')
click TRACKS tab
optionally click sort icon and select Title with Ascending
read Nth song rows from list
strategies.success_signal: Tracks listed in alphabetical order; Nth entry readable
strategies.fallback: Open Sort By dialog and ensure Title+Ascending selected

strategies.name: SORT_TRACKS_BY_ATTRIBUTE
steps: click sort icon near track count
in Sort By dialog select attribute (Title/Duration/Date Added/Album/Artist)
toggle Ascending to desired direction
strategies.success_signal: Dialog closes and tracks list re-orders accordingly
strategies.fallback: If direction toggle not tapped, re-open dialog and click Ascending checkbox

strategies.name: OPEN_PLAYLIST
steps: click the target playlist row under Custom/Smart Playlists
strategies.success_signal: Playlist detail view opens; shows tracks or 'Sorry..No songs to show!' if empty
strategies.fallback: If playlist is empty, task to play a song from it is infeasible

strategies.name: QUERY_ARTIST_ATTRIBUTE
strategies.preconditions: my_music_playlists visible; target artist name known; attribute is one of: song count, album count, total duration
steps: click ARTISTS tab from my_music_playlists to reach artists_tab
scroll the artist list, or use the Search icon, to locate the target artist by name
click the artist row to drill into artist_detail_view
read the queried attribute from the header/summary label at the top (e.g. 'N songs')
if the attribute is visible, emit status:complete with the exact value as the answer (exactly once)
if the library does not contain the target artist (the test library is ~15 tracks), emit status:infeasible instead of guessing
strategies.success_signal: artist_detail_view shows the target artist's name in the header and a numeric summary matching the queried attribute; status:complete is emitted exactly once with that number as the answer
strategies.fallback: If the detail view does not surface the attribute directly, fall back to counting the listed track rows manually. If the artist is absent from artists_tab, emit status:infeasible — Albums and Genres tabs do not group by artist so searching them will not recover the answer.

dead_ends.failed_action: attempting to play first song in 'Favorite' playlist
dead_ends.note: Playlist contains no songs ('Sorry..No songs to show!'); add songs first or mark infeasible

dead_ends.failed_action: searching for song/artist titles like 'Shine On You Crazy Diamond', 'Lightship', 'Wish You Were Here', 'Eason Chan', 'Pink Floyd'
dead_ends.note: Local library is small (15 tracks, 15 artists, 1 album 'Music' by Leon); target not present, returns 'No results found'. Repeated re-queries do not help.

dead_ends.failed_action: repeatedly scrolling down to find 'Pink Floyd' or 'Eason Chan'
dead_ends.note: Artist list is finite (15 Artists, D-T range). Scrolling past the end does nothing; artist is simply absent. Should stop after one full scroll and conclude infeasible.

dead_ends.failed_action: looking for 'Duration' sort option in artists sort dialog
dead_ends.note: Artists sort menu only offers Artist / No. of Albums / No. of Tracks. 'Duration' sort exists only in tracks sort dialog.

dead_ends.failed_action: navigating to GENRES to find an artist
dead_ends.note: Genres tab shows 'No Music found!'; not a valid path to locate artists.

dead_ends.failed_action: selecting Duration in sort dialog and claiming success without verifying direction
dead_ends.note: Tapping 'Duration' alone may leave Ascending checked; must explicitly toggle Ascending off to achieve Descending order. Agents mis-reported success.

categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: App open on the list screen where new items of this type are created
abstract_steps: Locate the primary add/create control (often a floating action button or + icon)
Trigger it to open a creation dialog/form
Fill required fields (e.g., name)
Confirm via the positive dialog button
failure_modes: Clicking the add control on the wrong tab/section
Confirming with empty or invalid name
Dismissing the dialog instead of confirming
verification_checklist: New item is visible in the corresponding list after dialog closes

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO_SECTION
categories.precondition: App open with tabbed or drawer navigation available
abstract_steps: Identify the section name relevant to the task (distinguishing between the different item-type sections available in the app)
Click the corresponding tab or drawer entry
Wait for the list content to load
failure_modes: Acting on the wrong tab's content
Assuming an item exists in a section it doesn't belong to

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
categories.precondition: Relevant list or detail view is reachable and not empty
abstract_steps: Navigate to the section containing the answer
Optionally apply a sort/filter to expose the required ordering
Read the requested field(s) directly from the UI
Return an answer action with the extracted value
failure_modes: Fabricating data when the target isn't in the library
Reading without ensuring correct sort direction
Confusing counts across different sections (mixing up item-type totals)
verification_checklist: Value is visible on-screen at time of answer
Sort/filter state matches the question's requirements
If item cannot be found after a bounded search, declare infeasible

categories.name: SEARCH_FOR_ITEM
categories.precondition: A search affordance is visible on a list screen
abstract_steps: Open the search interface
Type a concise query (a single attribute, not multiple attributes concatenated)
Inspect results; if none, try a broader/alternate term once
If still empty, conclude the item is absent
failure_modes: Appending new text to existing query (producing garbage like 'QueryQuery')
Treating empty results as transient and looping
verification_checklist: Query field shows the intended text only
Either a result row appears or an explicit 'No results' message is shown
Bounded retry count respected before declaring infeasible

categories.name: SORT_LIST
categories.precondition: On a list screen that exposes a sort control
abstract_steps: Open the ordering configuration dialog via its icon
Select the desired attribute
Explicitly toggle the ordering direction to the required state
Dismiss dialog and verify order
failure_modes: Selecting only the attribute without setting direction
Using the wrong list's sort dialog (attributes differ across sections)
Declaring success without visually confirming the new order
verification_checklist: Top-most items in list match expected ordering

categories.name: OPEN_CONTAINER
abstract_steps: Tap the container row
Verify detail view loads
Check whether the container is empty before further actions
failure_modes: Attempting interaction on an empty container
Treating an empty-container message as a transient error
verification_checklist: Detail view title matches selected container
If empty, an explicit empty-state message is present; declare infeasible for content-dependent goals

categories.name: PLAY_MEDIA
categories.precondition: Target media item is visible in a list or detail view
abstract_steps: Locate the target row
Tap to start playback or use the row's play control
Confirm playback UI (now-playing bar / player screen) appears
failure_modes: Tapping a container instead of a playable item
verification_checklist: Now-playing indicator reflects correct item identity
